description_long: This object is a large, industrial-style ceiling fan with five wide, flat blades radiating from a central hub. The central housing is dome-shaped and appears to be made of metal, with a small cylindrical cap at the top for mounting. The blades are evenly spaced and have a slightly tapered design, giving the fan a robust and efficient appearance. There is a subtle yellow ring near the base of the central hub, possibly indicating a functional or decorative element. The overall finish is matte gray, suggesting durability and suitability for urban or commercial environments. No visible blade guard or control panel is present, and the design is minimalistic and utilitarian.
description: A large, industrial ceiling fan with five wide, matte gray blades and a dome-shaped central hub, featuring a yellow accent ring.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the fan from a slightly elevated angle, highlighting the full spread of the five blades and the dome-shaped central hub.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a similar perspective, with the yellow accent ring on the hub more visible beneath the blades.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a comparable view, maintaining clear visibility of the blade arrangement and the central housing.
description_view_3: View 3 is nearly identical to the other views, with the five blades and central hub consistently visible.
attribute_blade_guard_design: No blade guard is present; the blades are fully exposed and attached directly to the central hub.
